overall.description: A smooth cinematic drone sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a continuous ascent from ground level in a mountain meadow, passing rock formations and pine trees, to reveal a vast canyon with a river, waterfall, and distant snow-capped peaks under dynamic partly cloudy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain meadow with large rock outcropping

agents.ego_description: moving slowly through tall grass past a massive rock formation with pine trees nearby

entered.detail: massive gray boulder dominating the foreground with rough textured surface
tall evergreen trees with green needles and brown trunks
tall green and yellow grass covering the ground
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon under cloudy skies

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at ground level in a mountain meadow, moving past a large rock formation surrounded by tall grass and pine trees. The camera drifts forward slowly, revealing distant mountains under a partly cloudy sky with patches of blue.

events.description: camera ascends from ground level revealing the expansive canyon and river gorge below
waterfall becomes visible cascading down the distant canyon wall

agents.ego_description: ascending above the tree line to survey the vast canyon landscape and river below

entered.detail: steep gray rock walls forming the sides of the canyon
deep river valley with water visible at the bottom
white waterfall cascading down the canyon face

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends smoothly from ground level, revealing a breathtaking canyon vista with steep cliffs and a river gorge. As the elevation increases, a waterfall becomes visible in the distance, and the pine trees shrink to a forest canopy below.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of canyon with waterfall and river pool

events.description: game UI element briefly appears in bottom right corner indicating Eagle Eye mode activation

agents.ego_description: flying over the canyon river examining the waterfall and tall rock spires from above

entered.detail: prominent vertical rock formation rising from the canyon floor
calm greenish water pool in the canyon river

segments.scene_description: Now at low aerial altitude, the camera glides over the canyon revealing a green river pool and a distinctive tall rock spire. The waterfall remains visible to the left while the camera maintains a steady forward flight path over the rugged terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: high aerial panorama of mountain valley with snow-capped peaks

agents.ego_description: soaring high above the canyon taking in the panoramic mountain vista with snow-capped peaks

entered.detail: distant mountain peaks with white snow visible on the summits

segments.scene_description: At high altitude, the camera captures a sweeping panoramic view of the entire valley system. Snow-capped mountains dominate the left horizon while the canyon river snakes through the forested valley below, showcasing the vast scale of the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera ascent from a secluded mountain meadow into a sweeping aerial panorama of a vast wilderness. It begins at ground level, drifting past a large rock formation and pine trees amidst tall grass under a partly cloudy sky. As the camera smoothly climbs, the intimate meadow gives way to a breathtaking canyon vista where the trees shrink into a forest canopy and a distant waterfall emerges. The scene then expands as the camera glides at a low aerial altitude over a green river pool and a distinctive rock spire, maintaining a steady path across the rugged terrain. Finally, the perspective shifts to a high-altitude panoramic view, revealing the full scale of the valley system with a snaking river below and snow-capped mountains dominating the horizon.
